1003 TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD O0110I1A Other: Transfusions (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received transfusions days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
